lines.text: Grey hoodies, they cover their heads / I can't see their faces / Can't see, see, see, see, see
They knew me / Look, sweat on my head / My heart's thumpin', drummin'
I got lost astray / In this forest runnin' away / I slip up, I'm on the edge now
And you held on to me / And you shake me, and tell me that I'm okay, but
I swear they smell the blood on me / I hear them coming for me
I wake up and the sky's blood red / I'm still heavy breathin' / Felt so much more than dreamin'
They said there's somethin' bleedin' in me / Somethin' screamin' in me / Somethin' buried deep beneath
I accelerate, and I accelerate / But my gears got stuck / I'm so alone now, swervin' out of control now / And I crash the whip
Arms out, you pull me / And wipe my wounds clean, but
